title: HOTO Electric Screwdriver Rechargeable, 3.6V Cordless Screwdriver Set USB-C, 3 Torque Settings, 1500mAh Battery, LED Light & 12 S2 Metal Bits for Furniture/Electrical Repairs
features: THE ULTIMATE CONVENIENCE - Five kinds of ultra-tough, 12 S2 steel bits — all rock-solid up to 60HRC for maximum durability. That magnetic tip has you swapping bits in a flash. Plus, the auto-on, no-shadow circular LED lets you work like a master craftsman, even in dimly lit workshops. Whether you're assembling furniture, DIY-ing your heart out, or doing electrical repairs, this electric screwdriver set is your go-to guy

ULTRA-LIGHT & ULTRA-COOL - This electric drill is all about easy elegance. It weighs in at just 0.55 pounds, the double-layered soft grip is crafted from tough plastic and TPE rubber for ultimate comfort. The frosted aluminum alloy storage box holds all 12 bits, giving you a ton of DIY possibilities. And that soft rubber handle on top. Makes the whole box super portable. So get ready to look and feel like a DIY superstar

ONE-HAND POWERHOUSE, TOTAL CONTROL - With our mini drill, you get three torque settings in the palm of your hand. (electric mode: max. 4 N·m / manual mode: max. 8 N·m). And that built-in smart sensor. It's your guardian angel. Release the button, the rotation stops—no scratched screws, no injured fingers. Just one hand and you're in complete control

CHARGE LESS, SCREW MORE- This power screwdriver packs a punch with its 1500mAh high-capacity battery. After a rigorous 37-step testing process, it offers insane endurance—driving over 1000 screws on a single charge. And when it's time to recharge. Just plug it into a Type-C port, and you're done in under 150 minutes. Super easy, super fast, and efficient!

Unlock your DIY potential with this all-inclusive kit: 1 x Cordless Screwdriver, 1 x Set of 12 Bits, 1 x Aluminum Storage Box, 1 x USB Type-C Charging Cable, 1 x User Manual. 5 types of bit assortment: Philips (Phillips head bits): PH1, PH2, PH3; Hex (Hexagon bits): H3, H4, H5, H6; Torx (Torx head bits): T15, T20, T25; Flat Blade (Flat head bits): SL4; Pozidriv (Pozidriv head bits): PZ2

Based on protection mechanism of 0V battery charge inhibition, please don't leave the machine uncharged too long. How can I see how much battery power left? ●When the battery level is below 20% in use, the indicator will blink red quickly. ●When charging, the indicator will slowly blink white. ●When fully charging, the indicator will become solid white. Can the screwdriver be using while a charging cable is connected? ●Sorry, it can't be used when the charging cable is connected. What are the applicable scenarios? ●Electric screwdrivers are versatile and suitable for a variety of homeowner tasks such as furniture assembly, light DIY projects and other tasks that require a portable bit. ●It is not suitable for the repair of Precision Instruments. What can I use this power screwdriver set for? ●Whether you're assembling furniture, DIY-ing your heart out, or doing electrical repairs, this electric screwdriver set is your go-to guy.
